summary: Relaxed, intimate small‑venue set captured in a clean FLAC; reviewers note Phil’s sour mood but overall enjoy the rarity.
review: The recording presents an easy‑going performance from a modest Harding show that fans will never see again. While Jerry, Bob and the rhythm section are not singled out, Phil’s apparent irritation is mentioned. No technical flaws are reported, making the FLAC source pleasant to listen to.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the show’s relaxed vibe and overall enjoyment; recording quality is not critiqued, implying it is at least good.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any audio flaws; listeners found the FLAC recording enjoyable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Relaxed, intimate atmosphere reflecting a small‑scale venue; overall performance is pleasant despite Phil’s sour demeanor.

band_member_comments.Phil: Reviewer notes that Phil seemed pissed off throughout the show.
